name: Drop It! Jelly Man
short_description: There's only one reason the Jelly Man goes into the deep end. He just needs a beer. Please join him on his dizzying adventure! To survive, you must fall into the water. Continue down. It won't be visible. Still, don’t give up and take the courageous plunge!
detailed_description: Fall into the cave with Jelly Man. All he has to do is have a beer! Find water to fall safely. If you fall into the water, you will live! Find the location of the water and fall accurately. Don't forget to check the flags! There will be an end someday. However, if you make even the slightest mistake... you will have to fall again.
about_the_game: Fall into the cave with Jelly Man. All he has to do is have a beer! Find water to fall safely. If you fall into the water, you will live! Find the location of the water and fall accurately. Don't forget to check the flags! There will be an end someday. However, if you make even the slightest mistake... you will have to fall again.
